disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid (~3 day) decline in energy and cold tolerance in a patient with known treated autoimmune thyroid disease
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what's been happening and when it started?
How quickly did this come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's come on over about three days — I was okay-ish and then I just crashed, no energy at all and freezing cold.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked subjective cold intolerance — wearing multiple layers in a heated home
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling the cold more than usual?
Any change in how you cope with temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm freezing all the time — the heating's up and I'm under blankets and still cold.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is fully alert and able to hold a conversation — no reduced level of consciousness
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to stay awake and talk with me okay?
Are you feeling drowsy or hard to keep awake?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm awake and I can talk, I'm just slow and foggy — but I'm not falling asleep on you.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No breathing difficulty — breathing normally, not gasping or short of breath
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing?
Is your breathing normal, or do you feel short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my breathing's fine — I'm not puffed or anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Poor oral intake for ~24 hours due to exhaustion; lives alone with no one currently checking in
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat and drink anything today?
Is there anyone at home with you or who can check on you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't really eaten or had much to drink since yesterday — I couldn't get up to make anything. And no, I live on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting, abdominal pain, dizziness on standing, or skin darkening reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any vomiting or tummy pain?
Do you feel dizzy or faint when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not being sick and my stomach's fine — I just feel wiped out and cold.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Taking prescribed thyroxine every day with no missed doses
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking your thyroid tablet as usual?
Have you missed any of your medication recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I take my thyroxine every morning — I haven't missed any.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent thyroid blood test reportedly normal (patient-reported, not independently verified)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any recent blood tests for your thyroid?
When were your thyroid levels last checked, and what were you told?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had bloods not long ago and they told me my thyroid level was normal, which is why this doesn't make sense to me.
